update.releaseNotes:
v5.3.1 - Changelog
> Trackblazer support is still fresh off the oven so expect some bugs. Regarding completion times on strong hardware, URA Finale averages 25 minutes, Unity Cup averages 35 minutes and Trackblazer averages 1 hour 20 minutes.
Adjustments --- - Update `Automation Library` to `2.5.5` to add a short delay before cleanup so the Discord DM can be sent properly when an Exception happens. - Add basic handling for the Insufficient Goal Points dialog for Trackblazer for when you are short on Goal Points to be able to clear the next checkpoint.
